'''âm-ch-p''' ('''kamachap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heat|heat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heat|heat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-ch-p
|-
! Lemma
| kamachap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimachap|thimachap]] || [[word:jimachap|jimachap]] || [[word:shimachap|shimachap]] || [[word:kimachap|kimachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumachap|thuthumachap]] || [[word:jujumachap|jujumachap]] || [[word:shushumachap|shushumachap]] || [[word:kukumachap|kukumachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumachap|thumachap]] || [[word:jumachap|jumachap]] || [[word:shumachap|shumachap]] || [[word:kumachap|kumachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumachap|thumachap]] || [[word:jumachap|jumachap]] || [[word:shumachap|shumachap]] || [[word:kumachap|kumachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themachap|themachap]] || [[word:jemachap|jemachap]] || [[word:shemachap|shemachap]] || [[word:kemachap|kemachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomachap|thothomachap]] || [[word:jojomachap|jojomachap]] || [[word:shoshomachap|shoshomachap]] || [[word:kokomachap|kokomachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomachap|thomachap]] || [[word:jomachap|jomachap]] || [[word:shomachap|shomachap]] || [[word:komachap|komachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomachap|thomachap]] || [[word:jomachap|jomachap]] || [[word:shomachap|shomachap]] || [[word:komachap|komachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmachap|thĂŠmachap]] || [[word:jĂŠmachap|jĂŠmachap]] || [[word:shĂŠmachap|shĂŠmachap]] || [[word:kĂŠmachap|kĂŠmachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamachap|thathamachap]] || [[word:jajamachap|jajamachap]] || [[word:shashamachap|shashamachap]] || [[word:kakamachap|kakamachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamachap|thamachap]] || [[word:jamachap|jamachap]] || [[word:shamachap|shamachap]] || [[word:kamachap|kamachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamachap|thamachap]] || [[word:jamachap|jamachap]] || [[word:shamachap|shamachap]] || [[word:kamachap|kamachap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamachap|shamachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamachap|goshamachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamachap|gokishamachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamachapnĂŒ|shamachapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamachapnknĂŒ|goshamachapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachapnĂŒ|gokishamachapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamachapshĂ«|shamachapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamachapnkshĂ«|goshamachapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamachapshĂ«|gokishamachapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachapro|shamachapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachapnkro|goshamachapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachapro|gokishamachapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachapmu|shamachapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachapnkmu|goshamachapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachapmu|gokishamachapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamachapsher|shamachapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamachapnksher|goshamachapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamachapsher|gokishamachapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamachapng|shamachapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamachapnkng|goshamachapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamachapng|gokishamachapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamachapya|shamachapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamachapnkya|goshamachapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamachapya|gokishamachapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamachapyam|shamachapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamachapnkyam|goshamachapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamachapyam|gokishamachapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachapnĂŒshĂ«|shamachapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamachapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamachapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachapnĂŒro|shamachapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachapnknĂŒro|goshamachapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachapnĂŒro|gokishamachapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachapnĂŒmu|shamachapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachapnknĂŒmu|goshamachapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachapnĂŒmu|gokishamachapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachapshĂ«nĂŒ|shamachapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamachapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamachapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachapshĂ«ro|shamachapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachapnkshĂ«ro|goshamachapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachapshĂ«ro|gokishamachapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachapshĂ«mu|shamachapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachapnkshĂ«mu|goshamachapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachapshĂ«mu|gokishamachapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachapronĂŒ|shamachapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachapnkronĂŒ|goshamachapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachapronĂŒ|gokishamachapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachaproshĂ«|shamachaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachapnkroshĂ«|goshamachapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachaproshĂ«|gokishamachaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamachapromu|shamachapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamachapnkromu|goshamachapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamachapromu|gokishamachapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamachapmunĂŒ|shamachapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamachapnkmunĂŒ|goshamachapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamachapmunĂŒ|gokishamachapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamachapmushĂ«|shamachapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamachapnkmushĂ«|goshamachapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamachapmushĂ«|gokishamachapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamachapmuro|shamachapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamachapnkmuro|goshamachapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamachapmuro|gokishamachapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
